post: Does anyone have a good way to remember the order of operations in math? I keep mixing up when to do multiplication vs addition.

author: student_anna
post: I found a really helpful method for structuring essays — start with your thesis, then use each paragraph to prove one part of it. My history grade went up a lot after I started doing this.
